title: Project foundation and infrastructure setup
description: Initialize Next.js 15 project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL connection, and Vercel deployment config

inScope: Next.js 15 project initialization with App Router

acceptanceCriteria.text: Next.js 15 project runs successfully on localhost:3000
TypeScript strict mode enabled with no compilation errors
Tailwind CSS v4 working with sample component
Drizzle ORM connected to PostgreSQL database
Project deploys successfully to Vercel preview
